# Quick Fix: Cross-platform APBX bundle compression
Generated: 2026-03-31T23-03-49Z

## Change Made
- File: `apps/os-desktop/src/main/lib/apbx.ts`
- Line(s): 289-296 (original) → 289-310 (after)
- Change: Replaced the single `spawnSync("zip", ...)` call with a platform branch:
  - Windows (`process.platform === "win32"`): calls `powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Compress-Archive -Path ... -DestinationPath ... -Force"`
  - All other platforms: keeps `zip -qr` as before
  - Both branches use `stdio: "pipe"` (was `"inherit"`) so stderr can be captured and surfaced in the error message on Windows

## Verification
- Syntax check: PASS (`pnpm exec tsc --noEmit` returned no errors)
- Pattern followed: existing `spawnSync` usage in the same file

## Files Modified
1. `apps/os-desktop/src/main/lib/apbx.ts` - cross-platform APBX compression

## Notes
- `Compress-Archive -Path <dir>` compresses the directory itself (preserving its name), matching the behaviour of `zip -qr output.zip foldername`.
- stderr is captured via `stdio: "pipe"` and included in the thrown error to aid debugging on Windows.
- No new dependencies required.
